title: atragene tenuiloba
intro: Atragene tenuiloba, also known as Mountain Columbine, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloid content, including berberine and sanguinarine, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Atragene tenuiloba include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
